source: 上海电气使用函数清单与MK函数对应.xls

functions.name: GetXFormFieldById
functions.description: 自定义表单根据控件ID获取对象
functions.notes: Use only when a control object is required; prefer MKXFORM.getValue/setValue for value access.

functions.name: AttachXFormValueChangeEventById
functions.description: 自定义表单通过控件ID绑定监听值变化方法，仅当ID标识的控件发生值变化时进行调用
functions.mkFunction: 需要转换为控件字段动作：onChange值发生变化见右侧图片
functions.notes: Translator should keep the deterministic control action boundary and translate the callback body into the existing onChange action.

functions.name: GetXFormFieldValueById
functions.description: 自定义表单根据控件ID获取对象值
functions.mkFunction: var value = MKXFORM.getValue('控件ID', { detailRowIndex: 明细表行号, nestRowIndex: 子明细表行号 })
functions.notes: Main-field reads map directly; detail table reads require row context and ${table:<sourceDetailTableId>} placeholders.

functions.name: SetXFormFieldValueById
functions.description: 自定义表单根据控件ID设置对象值
functions.notes: Main-field writes map directly; detail table writes require row-scoped APIs.

functions.name: XFormOnValueChangeFuns.push
functions.description: 添加监听函数，此队列中的函数将在表单值发生变化时被调用
functions.notes: Requires source context to map to one or more MK control actions.

functions.name: XFom_RestValidationElements
functions.description: 解决表单动态添加或删除后校验问题
functions.notes: Prefer native required/editable/visible rules when the source behavior is structural.

functions.name: GetXFormSameRowFieldById
functions.description: 获取明细表中通行的表单域
functions.notes: Requires tableId, controlId, and rowNum evidence.

functions.name: __xformDispatch
functions.description:
功能：自定义表单统一值发生变化分发函数（外部不调用）
 参数：
 value        ：发生值变化的控件的当前值
 domElement   ：当前发生值变化的控件Dom对象（可能是数组）
functions.mkFunction: 无，转换为字段值变化动作，则会进行函数调用，可无需统一分发
functions.notes: No target helper is needed when value-change callbacks are translated as MK control actions.

functions.name: GetXFormFieldByLabel
functions.description: 自定义表单根据显示文字获取对象
functions.mkFunction: 无，只可以根据控件ID获取
functions.notes: MK target API uses stable control IDs, not labels.

functions.name: Com_AddEventListener
functions.description: 往某个对象中添加一个事件Com_AddEventListener(obj, eventType, func)obj：对象，如：window、document等、	eventType：事件名称，不以on开始，比如："load"、"mouseover"、	func：需要执行的函数
functions.mkFunction: 对应表单动作，onLoad加载完毕
functions.notes: Only window load is currently mapped to onLoad; DOM events remain manual.

functions.name: Com_Parameter.event.submit.push
functions.description: 提交前插入函数，return false阻断提交
functions.mkFunction: 对应表单提交前动作、onBeforeSubmit提交前事件
functions.notes: Translate into onBeforeSubmit(context), handle context.isDraft, and return true/false or Promise<boolean>.

functions.name: DocList_AddRow
functions.notes: Requires source detail table id and rowValue mapping.

functions.name: DocListFunc_ReplaceIndex
functions.notes: Requires source detail table id, rowNum, and rowValue mapping.

functions.name: DocList_DeleteRow_ClearLast
functions.description: 增加删除到最后一行后，生成一空行的函数。
functions.mkFunction: MKXFORM.addRow(表单ID, rowValue) 值全设置为空
functions.notes: Preserve the legacy empty-row behavior only when row semantics are clear.

functions.name: DocListFunc_RefreshIndex
functions.notes: Requires source detail table id.

functions.name: document.getElementById
functions.notes: Mapped scripts must use MKXFORM APIs instead of direct DOM access.

functions.name: document.getElementsByName
functions.notes: Mapped scripts must use MKXFORM APIs instead of direct DOM access.

functions.name: document.getElementsByTagName
functions.notes: Mapped scripts must use MKXFORM APIs instead of direct DOM access.

functions.name: document.getElementsByClassName
functions.notes: Mapped scripts must use MKXFORM APIs instead of direct DOM access.

functions.name: Data_GetOrgPersonBeanNameByKey
functions.description: 根据关键字在指定的组织架构中查找数据
functions.notes: Direct mapping still requires argument and target-id validation.

functions.name: Data_GetOrgElementBeanNameByKey
functions.description: 根据关键字在指定的组织架构中查找数据
functions.notes: Requires source context and target API evidence before mapping.

functions.name: kmssdata.AddBeanData
functions.description: 根据javabean的名字，采用AJAX方式获取数据，并将返回的数据添加到数据对象中 var kmssData=new KMSSData(); kmssData.AddBeanData("kmLeaveTypeDialog&fdId="+strValue);
functions.notes: Direct mapping still requires argument and target-id validation.

functions.name: common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset
functions.description:
隐藏所有相同名字的控件对应的每行内容,并设置为非必填
主要用于明细表
functions.mkFunction:
/**
* 改变明细表单个字段显示属性(只读/必填等)。
* @param id 控件ID，可在数据模型中选中，格式[表ID.控件ID]
* @param value 1：只读，2：可编辑，3：必填， 4：隐藏字段标签及内容，5：显示，6：非必填
*/
MKXFORM.setDetailFieldAttr(控件ID, 1)
functions.notes: Prefer formRules.linkage when the row condition is structural; otherwise generate MK field attr/style calls only with clear target ids.

functions.name: set_required
functions.mkFunction:
/**
* 改变单个字段显示属性(只读/必填等)
* @param id 控件ID，可在数据模型中选中，格式[表ID.控件ID]
* @param value 1：只读，2：可编辑，3：必填， 4：隐藏字段标签及内容，5：显示，6：非必填
*/
MKXFORM.setFieldAttr(控件ID, 1)
functions.notes: Prefer native required rules when possible.

functions.name: set_not_required
functions.notes: Prefer native required rules when possible.

functions.name: common_not_required
functions.notes: Prefer native required rules when possible.

functions.name: common_required
functions.notes: Prefer native required rules when possible.

functions.name: Designer_Control_JSP_ShowEditFrame
functions.description: 初始化编辑器容器和Tab键快捷键，将JSP代码和名称填充至编辑框，显示弹窗并定位
functions.notes: Requires source context and target API evidence before mapping.
